allow: PowerShell($ua = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36"; $out = "C:\\Users\\black\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-black-Desktop-hdblog-estensione\\16ebecaf-cf15-4f98-a210-5b914b750a55\\scratchpad\\hdblog.html"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.hdblog.it/" -OutFile $out -UserAgent $ua -Headers @{"Accept-Language"="it-IT,it;q=0.9"} -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "OK saved"; \(Get-Item $out\).Length } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
